sync.transcodingHint: MKV/AVI audio is being extracted for playback. This is only needed the first time.

sync.autoSyncProgress.loadingModel: Audio preparation complete. Loading Whisper model...
sync.autoSyncProgress.noMatches: No confident matches found. Try a larger Whisper model or check that the SRT matches the audio.

flashcards.filesHelp: Series mode: add one subtitle file per episode. Native subtitles and media are matched automatically by name.
flashcards.filesHelpMovie: Movie mode: add the target subtitles, and optionally the native subtitles and a media file.

settings.language.resetSuccess: Language preferences and smart matching rules reset to defaults
settings.anki.resetSuccess: Anki templates and fields reset to defaults
